idle.closedLaptopLid: broad viewer-facing silver panel with graphite rim, hinge seam, and centered paw emblem

closedLaptopInvariant: closed exterior lid remains a filled viewer-facing surface at minimum display scale and never collapses into an edge-on line or disappears beneath Leo's paws
openLaptopInvariant: exterior lid faces viewer with graphite rim, hinge seam, and paw emblem; Leo sits behind the unseen screen
